title: Metabolomics of Two Pecan Varieties Provides Insights into Scab Resistance.
author: Lei Z Kranawetter C Sumner BW Huhman D Wherritt DJ Thomas AL Rohla C Sumner LW
content: S-EPMC6315810 PMC6315810 Metabolomics of Two Pecan Varieties Provides Insights into Scab Resistance. UHPLC-MS-based non-targeted metabolomics was used to investigate the biochemical basis of pecan scab resistance. Two contrasting pecan varieties, Kanza (scab-resistant) and Pawnee (scab-susceptible
